end,function(A,y)local s=W(y)local U=function()return E(A,{},y,s)end return U end,function(A,y)local s=W(y)local U=function(U,L)return E(A,{U;L},y,s)end return U end,function(A,y)local s=W(y)local return(u(188058+9071881,{}))(s(M))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[y(965079-965657)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
